description_long: This is a pair of tall, over-the-knee black boots made from a smooth, likely synthetic or leather material. The boots feature a series of large eyelets running up the outer side, suggesting a decorative or functional lacing system, though no laces are present. The upper section is form-fitting, designed to hug the leg closely, while the foot section is rounded and sleek. There is a visible zipper on the outer side, providing an easy way to put on or remove the boots. The surface appears mostly matte with a slight sheen, indicating a polished finish. The boots are in excellent condition, showing no visible signs of wear or damage.
description: A pair of tall, black over-the-knee boots with side eyelets and a zipper, made from smooth material and in excellent condition.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tall, sleek shafts and rounded toes of the boots.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the row of large eyelets and the zipper running up the outer side.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned back of the boots and the close fit around the calves.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again showing the eyelets and zipper, with the boots slightly angled.
